label: Stat part (sight psychic sensitivity offset)
description: Adds a psychic sensitivity offset that scales with the pawn's sight capacity.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

startsAt.label: Starts at
startsAt.description: Sight efficiency level at which the bonus begins to apply.

endsAt.label: Ends at
endsAt.description: Sight efficiency level at which the bonus reaches its maximum.
